title: Amtech S0645 Assorted bungee cords (6 pack)
features: UP TO 50% EXTENSION: This pack of six 8mm bungee cords in assorted colours can extend up to 50% and are perfect for tarpaulins, cars, trucks, trailers, bikes, boats and motorcycles
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for home, office, or workshop settings
description: Product Description Am-Tech 6-peice bungee cord set. Vinyl coated steel hooks with protective tips. Elasticated cord. Includes sizes 2x 12-inch (300mm), 2x 18-inch (450mm) and 2x 24-inch (600mm). Assorted colours. Display packed. Safety Warning No Box Contains 6x Bungee See more
